---
title: "Dashboard"
format: html
---

<label for="dashboard-select">Choose an index:</label>
<select id="dashboard-select" style="margin: 0.5rem 0 1rem 0;">
  <option value="plots/third_places_total_ranked.html">All Third Places</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_non_medical_total_ranked.html">All Third Places without Medical Facilities</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_non_medical_non_retail_total_ranked.html">All Third Places without Medical Facilities and Retail Stores</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_medical_ranked.html">Medical Facilities only</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_retail_ranked.html">Retail Stores only</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_food_beverage_ranked.html">Food & Beverage Places only</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_community_ranked.html">Community Spaces only</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_cultural_ranked.html">Cultural Venues only</option>
  <option value="plots/third_places_sport_leisure_ranked.html">Sports & Leisure Places only</option>
</select>

<iframe
  id="dashboard-frame"
  src="plots/third_places_total_ranked.html"
  style="width:100%; height:90vh; border:0; border-radius:12px;">
</iframe>

<script>
window.addEventListener("load", () => {
  const KEY = "selected-dashboard";
  const select = document.getElementById("dashboard-select");
  const frame = document.getElementById("dashboard-frame");

  function setDashboard(src) {
    frame.src = src;
    localStorage.setItem(KEY, src);
  }

  const saved = localStorage.getItem(KEY);
  if (saved && [...select.options].some(opt => opt.value === saved)) {
    select.value = saved;
    frame.src = saved;
  }

  select.addEventListener("change", () => {
    setDashboard(select.value);
  });
});
</script>
